heading: Regulations
label: 4705 Regulations
text: The Office of Personnel Management shall prescribe regulations to carry out the purpose of this chapter.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 4705, added , , , required annual report on research programs and demonstration projects, prior to repeal by , , .Pub. L. 95–454, title VI, § 601(a)92 Stat. 1188Pub. L. 105–362, title XIII, § 1302(b)(2)(B)(i)112 Stat. 3293Oct. 13, 1978Nov. 10, 1998
